nasb.text: In charge of the storehouses I appointed Shelemiah the priest, Zadok the scribe, and Pedaiah of the Levites, and in addition to them was Hanan the son of Zaccur, the son of Mattaniah; for they were considered reliable, and it was their task to distribute to their kinsmen.

esv.text: And I appointed as treasurers over the storehouses Shelemiah the priest, Zadok the scribe, and Pedaiah of the Levites, and as their assistant Hanan the son of Zaccur, son of Mattaniah, for they were considered reliable, and their duty was to distribute to their brothers.

cnv.text: 我委派示利米雅祭司、經學家撒督和利未人毘大雅作庫官，管理庫房；他們的助手是瑪他尼的孫子、撒刻的兒子哈難；這些人都是忠信可靠的；他們的責任是把人奉獻的各物分給他們的兄弟。

ccb.text: 我派示利米雅祭司、律法教师撒督及利未人毗大雅管理库房，并派撒刻的儿子、玛他尼的孙子哈难做他们的助手。这些人忠诚可靠，他们负责把物品分配给他们的弟兄。
